description: UrFuture provider portal only. Candidate/public flows are out of scope unless required as read-only views inside provider screens.

adapter_when: Server secret required (service role, third-party API key) — not user JWT passthrough
Inbound webhook or server-triggered side effect during Bubble migration
Multi-step orchestration intentionally kept off the client (not Promise.all of public Supabase calls)
Documented temporary migration facade with explicit remove-after note in decompose scope
adapter_forbidden_when: Single edge function proxy with user JWT (use provider-app fetch to functions/v1)
Single Supabase RPC proxy (use supabase.rpc from provider-app)
Single RLS-backed REST read/write (use supabase.from from provider-app)
Decompose marks frontend+adapter without naming a allowed adapter_when reason
forbidden: Duplicate or fork Supabase schema in adapter
Reimplement business rules that already exist in Supabase edge functions unless explicitly required by AC
Add passthrough routes when an equivalent direct client call exists in the same module
